YOUR KNOWLEDGE IS Property Provenance Power


AI is built on our collective knowledge and intellectual labour. KIP unlocks our digital property rights in AI, granting us our fair share of the economic benefits of the AI powered future.

Knowledge Bases / Data Sets
The lifeblood of the AI revolution

Kip Protocol is the decentralised base layer that AI models, apps & data owners build on, to safely transact & monetise in Web3.

KIP Unlocks digital ownership & Monetisation IN AI‍

A single AI query requires interactions between apps, models & data / knowledge bases. KIP makes it easy for AI value creators to quickly deploy and monetise their work.
